test.command: cargo test -j 4 && (cd src-tauri && cargo test -j 4) && (cd frontend && npm test -- --run)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify rust-worker TDD evidence requirements so transcript ordering and handoff `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` stay consistent (e.g., require an explicit pre-change failing test command or allow documented rationale when red/green cannot be shown verbatim).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review m5-session-store-introduce observed ApplyPatch edits preceding first targeted test command while the handoff still marked followedProcedure=true, creating ambiguity between required TDD process and acceptable transcript evidence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance to avoid false-positive targeted test checks in src-tauri: warn that `cargo test <name> -- --exact` can match zero plain `#[test]` functions and require confirming non-zero executed tests (or fallback to module/file-level targeted command).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review m5-csv-parsing-behind-backend-workflow noted a targeted src-tauri test command matched zero tests, yet could be interpreted as successful targeted validation.
